questions.question: Explain two key advantages of hybrid CPU-GPU systems over homogeneous systems.
expectedPoints: Specialized processing: CPUs handle complex control flow while GPUs handle data-parallel computation
Improved performance: Leveraging the strengths of different processor types for different parts of a problem

questions.question: Describe the major challenges in programming hybrid systems and strategies to address them.
expectedPoints: Programming complexity: Requires expertise in multiple programming models
Memory management: Coordinating data across different memory spaces
Load balancing: Ensuring both CPU and GPU are efficiently utilized
Data transfer optimization: Minimizing PCIe bus transfers through pinned memory and batching
Synchronization: Managing coordination between different processors
